accurate.why: All project descriptions and dollar amounts match the bill text exactly.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the act as authorizing VA major medical facility projects for FY2024.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The act provides new project-specific authorization rather than amending existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes project-specific funding caps and the flexibility for appropriations in the year funds are actually appropriated.

effective_dates.why: Notes FY2024 authorization and correctly describes the appropriation timing provision.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all 11 projects with descriptions and dollar limits, plus total appropriation authorization.

concise.why: Exhaustively itemizes each project with full descriptions; more granular than a summary requires.

correct_entities.why: VA Secretary, Sierra Nevada Health Care System, and all project locations correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: All project-specific dollar amounts and total $3,354,048,000 match the bill.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
